title: questions about rebuild of evangelion
wikitext:
[]: questions about rebuild of evangelion             Quote Post by Omegaoly » Wed Jan 20, 2010 8:44 am i want to buy Rebuild of Eva 1.1 Master digital edition(the white shining box)from Japan but i heard that it doesnt has english subs.i have watched the original TV Series should i have a problem with understanding the movie?how much new content the movie has from the original anime?If i buy the Special Edition from play.com will it have the jap voices?how good the english voice overs are anyway? also i want to ask about the release of Rebuild Of Evangelion 2.0.i heard spring 2010 but that only for Japan right?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 20, 2010 10:09 am If you're going to buy a Japanese release, I would advise against it unless you're buying purely for collection's sake. The set you're referring to would be region 2, so you would need a region 2 or 0 player, or would need to rip it, and even then, you wouldn't have subtitles. Rebuild 1.01 is currently available on DVD from Funimation. It's an okay release, but the 1.11 version coming out soon on DVD and BluRay will be a better purchase. It has a slightly better picture, and has a bit of extra footage included. As for the dub, many of the voices have changed, and it's been my observation that many people have been fairly negative towards it. It's fairly flat in my opinion, and that flatness undermines some of the dramatic moments, especially the film's climax. As for 2.0, it will be released on video in Japan sometime in the spring. Which will mean a proper fansub should be made available very shortly thereafter. Have patience lad, we're almost there! I wouldn't expect 2.0 to get released by Funimation until late this year at the earliest.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegaoly » Wed Jan 20, 2010 11:16 am ok thanks for answering.btw why animenewnetwork has Fly me to the moon as the opening theme to Rebuild of Evangelion 4?is it true that Rebuild Of Evangelion 3 will be releases this summer?we should have at least one trailer if they were planing to release it in 6 months......

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Jan 20, 2010 11:42 am Omegaoly wrote: ok thanks for answering.btw why animenewnetwork has Fly me to the moon as the opening theme to Rebuild of Evangelion 4?is it true that Rebuild Of Evangelion 3 will be releases this summer?we should have at least one trailer if they were planing to release it in 6 months......

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 20, 2010 11:49 am Omegaoly wrote: Why does Anime News Network have "Fly Me to the Moon" listed as the opening theme to Rebuild of Evangelion Final?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Jan 20, 2010 12:25 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Not true, they released a statement following 2.0 that they were launching aggressively into 3.0. and that it would be out much sooner. It may be overly optimistic, but they indicated it would be Summer 2010, as in, a wait of only one year. http://www.evageeks.org/2009/09/rebuild-of-evangelion-3-0-to-be-released-summer-2010/ I'm skeptic, but I think we can expect it within this year.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 20, 2010 1:01 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: Why would they rush out Evangelion 3.0 when they still havent had enough time to release the dvd and more merchandise for Evangelion 2.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jan 20, 2010 1:19 pm Or with that amount of staffers they could make the most beautiful nerdgasm the world has ever seen.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Jan 20, 2010 1:45 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Electric Sachiel wrote: Why would they rush out Evangelion 3.0 when they still havent had enough time to release the dvd and more merchandise for Evangelion 2.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 20, 2010 2:00 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It may be overly optimistic, but they indicated it would be Summer 2010, as in, a wait of only one year. http://www.evageeks.org/2009/09/rebuild-of-evangelion-3-0-to-be-released-summer-2010/ I'm skeptic, but I think we can expect it within this year.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Jan 20, 2010 2:14 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: If Sadamoto is saying he wants to finish the NGE manga first, I'd think that we'll hear about 3.0 towards the end of this year sometime if not next year, unless Sadamoto really gets his ass in gear with finishing the manga (then I'd say a 3.0 Summer release would be likely).

[]:             Quote Post by Omegaoly » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:23 pm anyone has any links from interviews from the produces of rebuild of eva(like anno).i would like to know what they think about the evangelion general and the new series.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:26 pm Omegaoly wrote: anyone has any links from interviews from the produces of rebuild of eva(like anno).i would like to know what they think about the evangelion general and the new series.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:31 pm Even if 3.0 doesnt get released in the summer,2.0 will be out.And in my opinion,that'll hold me over for a good while until we get a release date for it.
